reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the saw loop and keep one collider radius for every animation frame.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_saw_blade_8f_24fps.png through AssetServer and build an eight-column atlas.
runtime_notes: Animation plays continuously at 24 fps to imply 360 degrees per second rotation.
Collider uses the inner 20x20 logical circle rather than the tooth extremes.
The saw remains world-space and never shifts its center during the loop.

context.usage: Rotating saw hazard placed in later zones where the player reads both friction and timing under higher descent speed.

shape.silhouette: Circular saw with eight teeth, dark center hub, and one cold highlight that travels across the rim.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 192x24 px with eight 24x24 frames.
The rim highlight advances one tooth group per frame, creating a clean clockwise read.
Center hub stays aligned to the exact middle pixel region in every frame.
